top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(julianday('12-31') AS INTEGER) AS placeholder_for_year_end,  -- Placeholder, will be replaced
    COUNT(DISTINCT l.id_bioguide) AS distinct_legislators
FROM legislators l
JOIN legislators_terms lt ON l.id_bioguide = lt.id_bioguide
WHERE l.gender = 'M' 
  AND lt.state = 'LA'
  AND lt.term_end >= '1974-12-31'  -- At least 30 years ago from 2004 (current year assumption)
  AND lt.term_start <= '2024-12-31'  -- Still active or ended recently
GROUP BY 
    CAST((julianday('2024-12-31...

SELECT 
    CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', l.birthday) AS INTEGER) - 
    (CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', l.birthday) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - 
    (CAST(strftime('%Y', lt.term_start) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', l.birthday) AS INTEGER) - 
    (CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', lt.term_start) < strftime('%m-%d', l.birthday) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS years_since_first_term,
    COUNT(DISTINCT l.id_bioguide) AS distinct_legislators
FROM legislators l
J...

WITH year_calc AS (
    SELECT 
        l.id_bioguide,
        lt.term_start,
        lt.term_end,
        l.birthday,
        CAST((julianday('2000-12-31') - julianday(l.birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age_in_2000,
        CAST((julianday(lt.term_start) - julianday(l.birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age_at_term_start,
        CAST((julianday(lt.term_end) - julianday(l.birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age_at_term_end
    FROM legislators l
    JOIN legislators_terms lt ON l.id_bioguide = ...

WITH year_calc AS (
    SELECT 
        l.id_bioguide,
        lt.term_start,
        lt.term_end,
        l.birthday,
        CAST((julianday('2000-12-31') - julianday(l.birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age_in_2000,
        CAST((julianday(lt.term_start) - julianday(l.birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age_at_term_start,
        CAST((julianday(lt.term_end) - julianday(l.birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age_at_term_end
    FROM legislators l
    JOIN legislators_terms lt ON l.id_bioguide = ...
